boundary_definition: Layer 0 final query token attention probabilities after softmax over post-mask/pre-softmax attention logits including real key positions and the attention sink, before V consumption/output.
layout_interpretation: head-major [query_head, key_position_or_sink], flattened with real key positions 0..token_count-1 followed by sink at position token_count for each head
next_bounded_step: Runtime-forward can compare its final-token layer-0 post-softmax attention probability tensor against this official boundary; do not broaden to V, attention output, residual, logits, or later layers yet.
